title: bhargava-morampalli/rnamodbench pipeline parameters
description: RNA modification detection pipeline for Oxford Nanopore direct RNA sequencing

input_output_options.title: Input/output options
input_output_options.description: Define where the pipeline should find input data and save output data.

input.description: Path to comma-separated file containing information about the samples in the experiment.
input.help_text: You will need to create a design file with information about the samples in your experiment before running the pipeline. Use this parameter to specify its location. It has to be a comma-separated file with 5 columns, and a header row.

outdir.description: The output directory where the results will be saved. You have to use absolute paths to storage on Cloud infrastructure.

email.help_text: Set this parameter to your e-mail address to get a summary e-mail with details of the run sent to you when the workflow exits. If set in your user config file (`~/.nextflow/config`) then you don't need to specify this on the command line for every run.

reference_genome_options.title: Reference genome options
reference_genome_options.description: Reference genome related files and options required for the workflow.

references.description: Path to CSV file mapping target names to reference FASTA files. Format: target,reference (e.g., 16s,/path/to/16s.fa)
references.help_text: A CSV file with two columns: 'target' and 'reference'. Each row maps a target name (e.g., 16s, 23s, 5s) to its reference FASTA file path. The target names must match those used in the input samplesheet.

ref_16s.description: [DEPRECATED] Path to FASTA file for 16S rRNA reference. Use --references CSV instead.

ref_23s.description: [DEPRECATED] Path to FASTA file for 23S rRNA reference. Use --references CSV instead.

yanocomp_min_ks.description: Minimum KS statistic for yanocomp analysis.

xpore_diffmod_threshold.description: Differential modification threshold for xpore analysis.

nanocompore_min_coverage.description: Minimum coverage per position for nanocompore.
nanocompore_min_coverage.help_text: Set to 1 to disable coverage filtering, or higher (e.g., 30) for stricter filtering.

eligos_min_depth.description: Minimum read depth for ELIGOS analysis.

eligos_max_depth.description: Maximum read depth for ELIGOS analysis.

eligos_pval_thr.description: P-value threshold for ELIGOS (1.0 = no filtering).

eligos_oddR_thr.description: Odds ratio threshold for ELIGOS (0 = no filtering).

eligos_esb_thr.description: ESB threshold for ELIGOS (0 = no filtering).

epinano_zscore_threshold.description: Z-score threshold for EpiNano-Error outlier detection.

epinano_coverage_threshold.description: Minimum coverage per position for EpiNano-Error.

epinano_error_threshold.description: Error rate difference threshold for EpiNano-Error.

differr_fdr_threshold.description: FDR threshold for DiffErr significant sites.

drummer_pval_threshold.description: P-value threshold for DRUMMER significant sites.

drummer_odds_ratio.description: Minimum odds ratio for DRUMMER significant sites.

generic_options.title: Generic options
generic_options.description: Less common options for the pipeline, typically set in a config file.
generic_options.help_text: These options control generic pipeline runtime preferences.

publish_dir_mode.description: Method used to save pipeline results to output directory.
publish_dir_mode.help_text: The Nextflow `publishDir` option specifies which intermediate files should be saved to the output directory. This option tells the pipeline what method should be used to move these files. See [Nextflow docs](https://www.nextflow.io/docs/latest/process.html#publishdir) for details.

email_on_fail.description: Email address for completion summary, only when pipeline fails.
email_on_fail.help_text: An email address to send a summary email to when the pipeline is completed - ONLY sent if the pipeline does not exit successfully.

plaintext_email.description: Send plain-text email instead of HTML.

monochrome_logs.description: Do not use coloured log outputs.

hook_url.description: Incoming hook URL for messaging service
hook_url.help_text: Incoming hook URL for messaging service. Currently, MS Teams and Slack are supported.

schema_ignore_params.description: Comma-separated list of parameters that should not be validated.

institutional_config_options.title: Custom config options
institutional_config_options.description: Optional parameters used to describe custom config profiles.
institutional_config_options.help_text: These values are optional metadata for external config profiles. Leave defaults unless you intentionally use custom config bundles.

custom_config_version.description: Optional version or tag for custom config bundles.

custom_config_base.description: Base directory or URL for custom config bundles.
custom_config_base.help_text: Set this only if you explicitly maintain external config bundles.

igenomes_options.title: Reference genome options (iGenomes)
igenomes_options.description: Options for the iGenomes reference genome collection.
igenomes_options.help_text: The pipeline can use reference genomes from iGenomes if provided. This pipeline does not use iGenomes by default, but these parameters are kept for template compatibility.

genome.description: Name of iGenomes reference (not used in this pipeline).
genome.help_text: This parameter is not used by this pipeline. Use ref_16s and ref_23s instead.

igenomes_base.description: Directory / URL base for iGenomes references.

igenomes_ignore.description: Do not load the iGenomes reference config.
igenomes_ignore.help_text: Do not load `igenomes.config` when running the pipeline. You may choose this option if you observe clashes between custom parameters and those supplied in `igenomes.config`.

multiqc_options.title: MultiQC options
multiqc_options.help_text: These parameters are used to configure MultiQC report generation. Note: MultiQC is not currently implemented in this pipeline, but these parameters are included for future compatibility.

multiqc_config.description: Custom config file to supply to MultiQC.

multiqc_title.description: MultiQC report title. Printed as page header, used for filename if not otherwise specified.

multiqc_logo.description: Custom logo file to supply to MultiQC. File name must be absolute or relative to the output directory.

max_multiqc_email_size.description: File size limit when attaching MultiQC reports to summary emails.

multiqc_methods_description.description: Custom MultiQC yaml file containing HTML including a methods description.

downstream_analysis_options.title: Downstream analysis options
downstream_analysis_options.description: Optional downstream benchmarking and collation options.

run_downstream.description: Enable downstream analysis stage after modification calling.

ground_truth.description: Path to ground truth CSV/TSV file with known modification positions.

downstream_run_id.description: Optional run identifier used in downstream collation tables.

downstream_coverage_label.description: Optional coverage label (e.g. 100x) stored in collation outputs.

downstream_quality_label.description: Optional quality label stored in collation outputs.

downstream_differr_score_field.description: DiffErr downstream score mode: run canonical -log10(FDR), g_stat, or both.
